parameters.query:
INSERT INTO diffusion.jobs (
  job_id, request_id, batch_id, diffusion_id, source_agent,
  tenant_id, client_id, campaign_id, channel_name, credential_ref, diffusion_type,
  funnel_stage, scheduled_at, timezone, budget_amount, budget_currency,
  payload, status, retry_count, retry_max
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4::bigint, $5,
  $6::bigint, $7::bigint, $8::bigint, $9, $10, $11,
  $12, $13::timestamptz, $14, $15::numeric, $16,
  $17::jsonb, $18, $19::smallint, $20::smallint
)
RETURNING job_id, status, created_at;

SELECT job_id, request_id, batch_id, diffusion_id, source_agent, tenant_id, client_id, campaign_id, channel_name, credential_ref, diffusion_type, funnel_stage, scheduled_at, timezone, budget_amount, budget_currency, payload, status, retry_count, retry_max, platform_post_id, last_error, created_at, updated_at FROM diffusion.jobs WHERE job_id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2::bigint;
SELECT job_id, request_id, channel_name, status, created_at FROM diffusion.jobs WHERE request_id = $1 AND tenant_id = $2::bigint;
SELECT job_id, request_id, channel_name, status, scheduled_at, created_at FROM diffusion.jobs WHERE status = $1 AND tenant_id = $2::bigint ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200;

content.text: Ce post ne doit PAS être publié maintenant. Il est planifié pour Noël 2026.
